name: _primaryKey
description: Unique identifier for this record

name: _firstSeenAt
description: First time this record was seen

name: _lastSeenAt
description: Last time this record was updated

name: listingId
description: Unique listing ID (numeric, e.g., 9833690568)

name: eventId
description: Event ID this listing belongs to (join with stubhub_events)

name: price
description: Ticket price in dollars including all fees (e.g., 212.35)

name: faceValue
description: Face value of ticket in dollars (original printed price, 0 or null if not available)

name: section
description: Section name/number (e.g., 116, 325, 104)

name: row
description: Row within section - letter (A, B, GG), numeric (1-20+), or null if unassigned

name: seat
description: Seat range (e.g., "5_6", "1_6", "12_13") or null if unassigned

name: seatFrom
description: Starting seat number (e.g., "1", "5", "12")

name: seatTo
description: Ending seat number (e.g., "6", "13")

name: quantity
description: Number of tickets available in this listing (1-25, typically 2-8)

name: availableQuantities
description: Purchasable quantities (e.g., [1,2,3,4] means you can buy 1, 2, 3, or 4 tickets)

name: ticketClass
description: Ticket class ID (e.g., 594=Lower, 407=Upper, 954=Upper Level)

name: ticketClassName
description: Ticket class name (Lower, Upper, Mezzanine, Club Level, Plaza Level, etc.)

name: ticketTypeId
description: Ticket type ID (10=Mobile Transfer, 11=Mobile, 9=Mobile Entry, 1=Print-at-Home)

name: ticketTypeName
description: Ticket delivery type (Mobile Transfer ticket, Mobile ticket, Print-at-Home ticket)

name: listingTypeId
description: Listing type ID (1=standard ~95%, 14=other ~5%)

name: starRating
description: Deal star rating 1-5 (5=best deal, null ~0.5-11% of listings)

name: dealScore
description: Deal quality score 0-10 (e.g., 9.676, higher=better value)

name: discount
description: Discount factor vs avg price (e.g., 0.798=~80% off avg, negative=above avg)

name: seatQualityScore
description: Seat quality score (e.g., 4.533, higher=better seat position)

name: isSeatedTogether
description: Whether tickets are seated together (true ~94-96%, false ~4-6%)

name: isSpeculativeRow
description: Whether row is speculative/unconfirmed (true ~1-4%, false ~96-99%)

name: listingNotes
description: Listing notes/disclosures (Clear view, Front Row of Section, Limited view, Aisle seat, etc.)

name: createdAt
description: Listing creation timestamp
